description.zh-Hans: 使用多尺度皱纹噪波和方向拉伸生成皮革/兽皮/羊皮纸纹理。具有细纹、深褶、颜色变化和高光光泽等特性。支持可选的基础表面输入。所有噪波均可平铺。
description.en: Generates leather / hide / parchment textures using multi-scale wrinkle noise with directional stretching. Features fine grain, deep creases, color variation, and specular sheen. Optional base surface input. All noise is tileable.

triggers.zh-Hans: 皮革, 兽皮, 羊皮纸, 皮质, 动物皮, 旧书皮
triggers.en: leather, hide, parchment,皮质, animal skin, bookbinding

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成皮革纹理，用于角色装备、家具或古籍封面，可叠加在基础表面上。
exampleUsage.en: Generate leather textures for character equipment, furniture, or ancient book covers. Can overlay on a base surface.
